sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je ujutro otišao na intervju za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to a new job interview in the morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْتَدِي مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَيَشْعُرُ بِالْقَلِيلِ مِنَ التَّوَتُّرِ.
sentences.translation: Nosio je formalnu odjeću i osjećao je malu nervozu.
sentences.translationEn: He was wearing formal clothes and feeling a little nervous.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَتَحَدَّثَ عَنْ مَهَارَاتِهِ السَّابِقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorio je na pitanja samouvjereno i pričao o svojim prethodnim vještinama.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions confidently and talked about his previous skills.

sentences.arabic: اِبْتَسَمَ الْمُدِيرُ لَهُ وَتَمَنَّى لَهُ التَّوْفِيقَ فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor mu se nasmiješio i poželio mu sreću u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The manager smiled at him and wished him success in the future.
